briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Initialize - Initializes an instance of the XV_hscaler driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function looks up the configuration for a given device using the specified base address, and then initializes the XV_hscaler instance with the found configuration. If the configuration cannot be found, the function sets the instance as not ready and returns an error code.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_hscaler instance to be initialized.
Base address of the device to initialize.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the device configuration could not be found.
The caller must ensure that the InstancePtr is not NULL.
This function must be called before using the XV_hscaler instance.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_LookupConfig - Looks up the configuration for a V_HScaler device.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the XV_hscaler_ConfigTable for a configuration entry that matches the specified BaseAddress. If a matching entry is found, a pointer to its configuration structure is returned. If BaseAddress is zero or NULL, the function returns the first entry in the table.

parameterdescription.para: The base address of the device instance to look up.

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration structure if found, or NULL if no matching entry exists.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_CfgInitialize - Initializes an XV_hscaler instance.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance to be worked on.
ConfigPtr
points to the configuration structure.
EffectiveAddr
is the base address of the device.
XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
None. XV_hscaler_CfgInitialize - Initialize an XV_hscaler instance. This function initializes an XV_hscaler instance using the provided configuration structure and effective base address. It copies the configuration, sets the base address, and marks the instance as ready for use.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_hscaler instance to be initialized.
ConfigPtr
Pointer to the configuration structure for the device.
EffectiveAddr
Physical base address of the device.
XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
ConfigPtr must not be NULL.
EffectiveAddr must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Start - Start the HScaler hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.

simplesect.para: None This function sets the ap_start bit in the control register to start the hardware. It preserves the auto-restart bit.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_IsDone - Check if the HScaler operation is done.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the control register and checks the ap_done bit (bit 1) to determine if the hardware has finished processing.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_IsIdle - Check if the HScaler hardware is idle.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the control register and checks the ap_idle bit (bit 2) to determine if the hardware is idle.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_IsReady - Check if HScaler is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the control register and checks the ap_start bit (bit 0) to determine if the hardware is ready for the next input. Returns 1 if ready, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_EnableAutoRestart - Enable auto-restart mode.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
None This function sets the auto-restart bit (bit 7) in the control register, enabling the hardware to automatically restart after completing an operation.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_DisableAutoRestart - Disable auto-restart mode.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
None This function clears the auto-restart bit (bit 7) in the control register, disabling the hardware from automatically restarting after completing an operation.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Set_HwReg_Height - Set the HWREG_HEIGHT register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
is the value to write to HWREG_HEIGHT register.

simplesect.para: None This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_HEIGHT register of the HScaler hardware.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Get_HwReg_Height - Get HWREG_HEIGHT register value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the HWREG_HEIGHT register from the HScaler hardware and returns its value.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Set_HwReg_WidthIn - Set HWREG_WIDTHIN register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
is the value to write to HWREG_WIDTHIN register.

simplesect.para: None This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_WIDTHIN register of the HScaler hardware.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Get_HwReg_WidthIn - Get HWREG_WIDTHIN register value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the HWREG_WIDTHIN register from the HScaler hardware and returns its value.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Set_HwReg_WidthOut - Set HWREG_WIDTHOUT register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
is the value to write to HWREG_WIDTHOUT register.

simplesect.para: None This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_WIDTHOUT register of the HScaler hardware.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Get_HwReg_WidthOut - Get HWREG_WIDTHOUT register value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the HWREG_WIDTHOUT register from the HScaler hardware and returns its value.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Set_HwReg_ColorMode - Set HWREG_COLORMODE register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
is the value to write to HWREG_COLORMODE register.

simplesect.para: None This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_COLORMODE register of the HScaler hardware.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Get_HwReg_ColorMode - Get HWREG_COLORMODE register value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the HWREG_COLORMODE register from the HScaler hardware and returns its value.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Set_HwReg_ColorModeOut - Set HWREG_COLORMODEOUT reg.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
is the value to write to HWREG_COLORMODEOUT reg.

simplesect.para: None This function writes the specified value to the HWREG_COLORMODEOUT register of the HScaler hardware.

briefdescription.para: XV_hscaler_Get_HwReg_ColorModeOut - Get HWREG_COLORMODEOUT reg value.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XV_hscaler instance.
This function reads the HWREG_COLORMODEOUT register from the HScaler hardware and returns its value.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hardware register pixel rate.

parameterdescription.para: The value to set in the hardware register pixel rate.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register pixel rate.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register pixel rate.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the base address of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

simplesect.para: The base address of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the high address of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

simplesect.para: The high address of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the total bytes of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

simplesect.para: The total bytes of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the bit width of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

simplesect.para: The bit width of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the depth of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

simplesect.para: The depth of the hardware register hfltCoeff.

briefdescription.para: This function writes words to the hardware register hfltCoeff.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to write.
The number of words to write.

briefdescription.para: This function reads words from the hardware register hfltCoeff.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the read data.
The number of words to read.

briefdescription.para: This function writes bytes to the hardware register hfltCoeff.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to write.
The number of bytes to write.

briefdescription.para: This function reads bytes from the hardware register hfltCoeff.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the read data.
The number of bytes to read.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the base address of the hardware register phasesH_V.

simplesect.para: The base address of the hardware register phasesH_V.

briefdescription.para: function gets the high address of the hardware register phasesH_V.

simplesect.para: The high address of the hardware register phasesH_V.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the total bytes of the hardware register phasesH_V.

simplesect.para: The total bytes of the hardware register phasesH_V.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the bit width of the hardware register phasesH_V.

simplesect.para: The bit width of the hardware register phasesH_V.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the depth of the hardware register phasesH_V.

simplesect.para: The depth of the hardware register phasesH_V.

briefdescription.para: This function writes words to the hardware register phasesH_V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to write.
The number of words to write.

briefdescription.para: This function reads words from the hardware register phasesH_V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the read data.
The number of words to read.

briefdescription.para: This function writes bytes to the hardware register phasesH_V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the data to write.
The number of bytes to write.

briefdescription.para: This function reads bytes from the hardware register phasesH_V.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer to store the read data.
The number of bytes to read.

briefdescription.para: This function enables global interrupts.
This function disables global interrupts.
This function enables specific interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to enable.

briefdescription.para: This function disables specific interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to disable.

briefdescription.para: This function clears specific interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to clear.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the enabled interrupts.
This function gets the interrupt status.
